response.justification: 19 years of full-stack experience with current Staff role at re:cinq directly matching primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and explicitly including required AI agent development experience; demonstrates architecture depth, testing-first culture, and strong engineering discipline. Main gaps are Nest.js not explicitly mentioned and some testing framework specifics, but these are learnable given strong fundamentals.
strengths: Current Staff role with exact primary stack and AI agent development experience
19+ years full-stack experience with proven architecture and ownership
Testing-first culture and broad technical depth across multiple languages
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite strong Node.js and TypeScript background
Specific testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) not detailed despite clear testing focus
PostgreSQL experience not mentioned (though MySQL and SQL background present)

key_factors.factor: Current role with primary stack and AI agent development
